overview.description: Stats Perform (formerly Opta) provides sports data APIs, push feeds, editorial content, video, and betting stats across all major global sports. APIs require authentication. Two main data delivery methods: REST API (sdapi) and Push/Streaming (opta-push).

sdapi_patterns.MA: Match feeds (e.g. MA1 = Match, MA2 = Match Statistics, MA3 = Match Events)
sdapi_patterns.TM: Team feeds (e.g. TM1 = Teams, TM2 = Standings, TM3 = Squads, TM4 = Seasonal Stats)
sdapi_patterns.PE: Person/Player feeds (e.g. PE9 = NLG Player Bios)

opta_push_patterns.F: Football/Soccer feeds (F1-F75+, e.g. F1 = Live Scores, F9 = Match Events, F24 = Match Stats)

dynamic_betting_stats_api.description: GraphQL-based API for dynamic betting statistics. Supports queries for events, head-to-head, recommendations, home/away splits.
